response:
The actor who portrayed the characters "Kick-Ass" and "Count Vronsky" is **Aaron Taylor-Johnson**. 

- **Kick-Ass**: Aaron Taylor-Johnson played the title character in the feature film adaptations "Kick-Ass" (2010) and "Kick-Ass 2" (2013).
- **Count Vronsky**: He portrayed Count Vronsky in the BBC miniseries "Anna Karenina" (2000), and also provided the voice of John "Soap" MacTavish in the video games.

Thus, Aaron Taylor-Johnson is the actor who portrayed both "Kick-Ass" and "Count Vronsky."
